heading: Prohibition on overhaul, repair, and maintenance of Coast Guard vessels in foreign shipyards
label: 1153 Prohibition on overhaul, repair, and maintenance of Coast Guard vessels in foreign shipyards
text: A Coast Guard vessel the home port of which is in the United States or Guam may not be overhauled, repaired, or maintained in a shipyard outside the United States or Guam, other than in the case of voyage repairs.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 96 of this title2010— substituted “in the United States or Guam” for “in a State of the United States” and inserted “or Guam” after “outside the United States”.Pub. L. 111–281
